tools.name: memraw
tools.oneLiner: An open experiment in memory for AI agents — the whole memory, always in the prompt.
tools.description:
An open experiment in memory for AI agents — the whole memory, always in the prompt.
Most memory systems assume context is scarce, so they embed, rank and retrieve. memraw bets the other way: windows keep growing and prompt caching keeps getting cheaper, so maybe you can skip retrieval entirely.
